name: Kids' 6pc 15.5 fl oz Plastic Cereal Bowl - Pillowfort™: Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, Multicolored
description: Give your kid fun color options for everyday dining with the 6-Pack Plastic Cereal Bowls from Pillowfort™. This pack of six cereal bowls comes with assorted colors for easy mixing and matching with rest of the dinnerware, or creating a party setting to enjoy with friends. Made with plastic, these BPA-free bowls can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleanup, and are microwave safe for reheating only.
